name: Baked Cod Provencal
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F. Arrange fillets in an 8x8x2-inch square baking dish.
2. Sauté onion and garlic in oil in a medium-size skillet over medium heat for 3-5 minutes, or until lightly softened. Add tomatoes, capers, basil, olives, lemon juice, oregano, salt (if using), and pepper. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for 8 minutes. Spoon the sauce over the fish.
3. Bake in the preheated 450°F oven for 10 minutes, or until cooked through.
